title: Stuffed Turkish Lettuce Wraps
description: A flavorful and refreshing take on traditional wraps, featuring tender lettuce leaves filled with a savory mixture of kuru, fasulye, and spices.
instructions: 1. Wash and dry the lettuce leaves.
2. In a pan, heat the Turkish spices over medium heat.
3. Add the kuru and fasulye, cooking until the mixture is heated through.
4. Lay a lettuce leaf flat and spoon a small amount of the kuru-fasulye mixture onto the center of the leaf.
5. Top with a slice of pillowy bread.
6. Fold the lettuce leaves over the filling to create a wrap.
8. Garnish with iceberg lettuce and serve immediately.
